evals.prompt: Run a red-team audit on the auth flow.
evals.expected_output: Should route to harden-it. Should establish a threat model (STRIDE per trust boundary), audit tree-wide, prove exploits with PoCs, fix, RE-ATTACK the fix, audit the vulnerability class, and re-audit until CLEAN.
assertions: Mentions exploit PoC → fix → RE-ATTACK loop
Does not route to review-it or clean-sweep

evals.prompt: A security scanner found secrets in the repo.
evals.expected_output: Should route to harden-it. Secret leaks require verified rotation (one-way human gate) and a clean re-audit, not just line deletion.
assertions: Mentions secret rotation as one-way gate
Requires verified rotation, not just deletion

evals.prompt: Review this PR for security issues.
evals.expected_output: Should NOT route to harden-it. A bounded per-diff security lens is review-it's risk-review lens. harden-it is the full adversarial loop.
